T001.did: Confirmed the bundled spec-kit extension install path resolves; verified the working surfaces before edits.
concerns: Working on branch main rather than a fresh 140-resume-beta-family branch; branch creation left to the workflow/git step.

T007.did: On activation, read companion.resumeBeta and set the resumeBeta context key alongside the templateProfile/complexityFastPath block.

T008.did: Added an onDidChangeConfiguration branch that re-reads resumeBeta and re-sets the context key live — no reload, no companion.yml write.

T009.did: Added COMPANION_STEP_COMMAND mapping the four steps to /speckit.companion.* commands, mirroring STEP_COMMAND's keys.

T010.did: Added _step_command(step, profile) returning the companion map for turbo specs and the stock map otherwise, both via .get(step).

T011.did: resolve() reads the profile pin and routes every nextCommand assignment (implement-continue, advance, finish-current, clarify/analyze fall-through) through _step_command; derived no-ctx path stays stock.

T013.did: Exercised resolve() directly: turbo specs resolve /speckit.companion.<step> and standard/absent resolve /speckit.<step> across plan/tasks/implement plus finish-current and clarify fall-through — 0 cross-family mismatches.

T012.did: Statically verified the full gate chain — setting property (default false), menu when-clause (&& speckit.resumeBeta), context-key catalog/reset, and activation + onChange handlers — with a clean tsc compile and all 899 tests passing.
concerns: The live visual toggle (button absent off → appears on → hides again, no reload) requires a running VS Code Extension Host and was not exercised headlessly; the no-reload wiring is confirmed by the onDidChangeConfiguration branch.

T014.did: Added a Resume Button (beta) subsection to the README Beta Features area documenting resumeBeta, the gated ▶ button, no-reload toggle, command-family dispatch, and the no-companion.yml-mirror distinction.

T015.did: Added an Unreleased CHANGELOG entry for the beta-gated resume button + command-family dispatch, plus a Changed note for the rewritten Beta Features descriptions.

T016.did: Updated the spec-kit extension README resume command-table row and added a CHANGELOG Changed entry describing the profile-driven command-family resolution.

T017.did: Updated docs/sidebar.md Resume section to note it is opt-in beta (resumeBeta), toggled with no reload, and dispatches the spec's own command family.

T018.did: Final validation against SC-001…SC-005: confirmed the 4 Beta descriptions are effect-first at ~2 lines, 0 cross-family mismatches in resolve(), valid package.json/.spec-context.json, all 899 tests pass, and no demo fixtures touched.
